questions.question: What was the Fresh Prince doing when a couple of guys, who were up to no good, started making trouble in his neighborhood?
questions.answer: Shootin' some bball outside of the school

questions.question: What product developed by Jim Barton and Mike Ramsay in 1999, became one of the most popular Digital Video Recorder products available?
This television actress and R&B Grammy-winning singer had hits with "Baby" and "I Wanna Be Down."
As of 2020, what athlete had won 28 Olympic medals, 23 of them gold?
Shaggy told us to deny everything, even when caught, by saying this one phrase.
